items.title: Unanswered questions remain after death of Australia's most wanted fugitive
items.dek: Double-murderer Dezi Freeman evaded capture for seven months in the bush but police believe he had help.
items.body: Double-murderer Dezi Freeman evaded capture for seven months in the bush but police believe he had help.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Artemis II crew take 'spectacular' image of Earth
items.dek: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.
items.body: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.
items.body: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.
items.author: IriLine Desk
